title: GraphQL Status Columns not appearing in Form Preview
excerpt:
When using change_simple_column_value and also create_labels_if_missing, the newly created labels from non existing labels do not appear in a form preview but only in the edit mode. 
Anybody know what’s going on here?

posts.author: DueyLam (Duey)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using change_simple_column_value and also create_labels_if_missing, the newly created labels from non existing labels do not appear in a form preview but only in the edit mode.

Anybody know what’s going on here?
